title: lightweight UPDATE doesn't work with WHERE col IN (SELECT
description:
### Company or project name
_No response_
### Describe what's wrong
lightweight UPDATE doesn't work for replicated tables with partitions when some subquery is in conditions
fiddle is down, can't use it
### Does it reproduce on the most recent release?
Yes
### How to reproduce
25.8.3 or head (2025-09-18)
```
CREATE TABLE lightweight_test ON CLUSTER '{cluster}'
(
ts DateTime,
value String,
key String
)
ENGINE = ReplicatedMergeTree('/clickhouse/tables/{shard}/lightweight_test','{replica}')
PARTITION BY toYYYYMMDD(ts)
PRIMARY KEY (key)
ORDER BY (key)
SETTINGS enable_block_number_column = 1, enable_block_offset_column = 1;
CREATE TABLE keys ON CLUSTER '{cluster}'
(
key String
)
ENGINE = ReplicatedMergeTree('/clickhouse/tables/{shard}/keys','{replica}')
PRIMARY KEY (key)
ORDER BY (key);
INSERT INTO lightweight_test
VALUES (now(), 'val', 'key');
INSERT INTO keys
VALUES ('key');
SELECT * FROM lightweight_test
UPDATE lightweight_test
SET
value = 'UPDATED-1'
WHERE
key IN (
SELECT key FROM keys
)
SELECT * FROM lightweight_test
```
### Expected behavior
`value` column should contain 'UPDATED-1', it works if change WHERE to `WHERE key IN ('key')`
### Error message and/or stacktrace
`value` column contains the same value
### Additional context
_No response_
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE lightweight_test (ts TIMESTAMP, value VARCHAR, key VARCHAR, status INTEGER);
CREATE TABLE keys (key VARCHAR, priority INTEGER);
UPDATE lightweight_test SET value = 'UPDATED-2' WHERE key IN (SELECT key FROM keys WHERE priority > 1);
key_bug_features: lightweight UPDATE fails with subquery in WHERE clause
